prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Cryo-EM structure of CRBN-DDB1 in complex with HBS1L and TNG961. Entity description: HBS1-like protein. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V64 E62 replay metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context heteromeric_context ligand_context metal_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. E62 tests whether strong membrane/topology context outranks incidental ligand/cofactor or oligomer/assembly context. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: RCSB public non-coordinate component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['ZN']
RCSB public metadata indicates multiple copies or assembly context
